dept_pmc_zone_desc: Pune Municipal Corporation is divided into 4 zones for administrative management of civic services across the city.
dept_pmc_admin_ward_desc: Administrative wards within PMC zones, each headed by an Assistant Commissioner overseeing local civic services.
dept_pmc_electoral_ward_desc: Electoral wards within PMC for local body elections, each represented by an elected corporator.
dept_pmc_prabhag_desc: Prabhag (multi-member ward) boundaries used for PMC elections, grouping multiple wards into a single constituency.
dept_election_ac_desc: Assembly constituencies electing Members of Legislative Assembly to the Maharashtra Vidhan Sabha.
dept_election_pc_desc: Parliamentary constituencies electing Members of Parliament to the Lok Sabha.
dept_admin_district_desc: Revenue district headed by the District Collector for general administration.
dept_admin_taluk_desc: Taluks headed by Tahsildars for revenue collection and land administration.
dept_pincode_desc: Postal PIN code areas served by India Post offices.
